title: CodeUChain - Universal Chain Architecture
hero_description: The same elegant patterns, expressed in every programming language. A universal architecture that makes complex systems simple, beautiful, and maintainable across Python, Go, JavaScript, C#, Rust, and beyond.
install_command:
pip install codeuchain  # Python
npm install codeuchain  # JavaScript
cargo add codeuchain    # Rust
go get github.com/codeuchain/codeuchain/go  # Go
quick_example:
# Universal pattern — same in every language
state  = new State({ user_id: 101 })

chain = new Chain()
  .add(Link('fetch',   ctx -> fetch_user(ctx)))
  .add(Link('auth',    ctx -> check_role(ctx, 'admin')))
  .add(Link('process', ctx -> run_business_logic(ctx)))

result = chain.execute(state)

if result.error:
    handle_failure(result.error)
else:
    print(result.get('output'))
